title: Community Volunteer Income Tax Program - Canada.ca
content:
## Community Volunteer Income Tax Program: Need help with your taxes?
Meet Marie, she's a student filing her taxes for the first time.
But Marie doesn't know where to start.
That is, before she discovers...
If you have a modest income and a simple tax situation, volunteers in your community can do your taxes for you, for free!
- File your taxes on time
- Get benefits and credits
So Marie goes online to find a clinic right away.
Learn more: Canada.ca/taxes-help
